findings.title: Price Text Overflow & Wrapping
findings.description: Resolved a critical layout defect where browser slash-breaks forced the price unit 'изделие' to wrap to a second line. Added whitespace-nowrap and reduced font-size to text-2xl/text-3xl to ensure 100% responsive safety across all viewport sizes.

findings.title: Broken Accent Shadows & Low Contrast Hover
findings.description: Fixed an invalid tailwind shadow referencing undefined '--primary-rgb'. Resolved contrast bug where card button and header hovered elements turned ink black on a black gradient background. Implemented custom CSS-property-based accents that dynamically highlight categories with neon category colors.

findings.title: Interactive Micro-Animations
findings.description: Introduced cinematic background scale-up on video/image (1.05 slow zoom), ArrowRight transform translation (+6px), and tactile click compress (active:scale-0.97) for industry-leading luxury UX.

findings.title: Emerald Green Category Accent Color
findings.description: Changed 'Монтаж и запуск' (metal-letters) accent color from white to high-end emerald green (#10B981) to ensure color-spectrum alignment with neon-like categories.
